content:
✨ autoskills | Ruby
🎯 Primary Use Case: To automate the installation of AI agent skills based on a project's detected technology stack, streamlining the integration of AI into development.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic tech stack detection • Curated AI agent skill registry • Secure installation process • No configuration required • Support for a wide range of technologies
📖 Summary: Autoskills is a command-line tool that automatically detects a project's technology stack and installs relevant AI agent skills from a curated registry. It simplifies the process of integrating AI capabilities into development workflows by handling the detection, selection, and installation of necessary skill files.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
